overview.label: Tarot
overview.value: XIX The Sun · XVI The Tower

related.name: ♂ Mars
related.teaser: Mars is the blade of fire — spear of will, tower’s flame, the storm of courage.

related.name: Zephyrus
related.teaser: Heart is the vesica of the world — the overlap where differences become devotion.

related.name: Citrine
related.teaser: Solar fire is the sovereign flame—the courage to act and become.

related.name: Garnet
related.teaser: Solar fire is the sovereign flame—the courage to act and become.

related.name: Agni
related.teaser: Agni is a spark that purifies — Flame; in Leo.

related.name: 🟡 Solar Plexus (Manipura)
related.teaser: Solar plexus is the furnace of power — fire of will, anger purified into radiance.

related.name: Queen of Wands
related.teaser: Queen of Wands is the wand of fire — Contain and cultivate; depth with discernment.

related.name: King of Wands
related.teaser: King of Wands is the wand of fire — Set order and direction; steward the realm.

related.name: Nine of Wands
related.teaser: Nine of Wands is the wand of fire — Satisfaction and sovereignty; inner harvest.

related.name: Seven of Wands
related.teaser: Seven of Wands is the wand of fire — Assess motive; clarity over confusion.

related.name: Four of Wands
related.teaser: Four of Wands is the wand of fire — Structure and rest; beware stagnation.

related.name: Five of Wands
related.teaser: Five of Wands is the wand of fire — Friction reveals truth; growth through test.
